task_completion.description: Verify the basic header details of the Commission Plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Commission window or form in iDempiere. The 'Name' field should be 'Q3 2024 Sales Incentive', the 'Search Key' (or Document No) should be 'COMM-Q3-2024', and the Business Partner or Sales Rep field should be set to 'Joe Block'.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration settings of the Commission Plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the same Commission header form, verify that 'Currency' is set to 'USD', 'Calculation Basis' is set to 'Invoice', 'Frequency' is set to 'Quarterly', and the 'List Details' checkbox is checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the first commission line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Commission Line' tab or section. There should be a line item with the Name or Description 'Base Sales Commission'.

task_completion.description: Verify the multiplier and constraints for the first commission line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: For the 'Base Sales Commission' line, the 'Multiplier' (or Amt Multiplier) field must be set to 5 (or 5.0), and the 'Positive Only' checkbox must be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the second commission line and its category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a second line item in the 'Commission Line' tab. The Name or Description should be 'Patio Furniture Bonus', and the 'Product Category' field must be set to 'Patio Furniture'.

task_completion.description: Verify the multiplier and constraints for the second commission line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: For the 'Patio Furniture Bonus' line, the 'Multiplier' (or Amt Multiplier) field must be set to 10 (or 10.0), and the 'Positive Only' checkbox must be checked.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to create the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the iDempiere web interface (forms, buttons, tabs) rather than a terminal window executing SQL commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual iDempiere application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine iDempiere ERP system, not a text editor, notes app, or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI to inject data.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent writing bash or python scripts to directly insert the expected values into the PostgreSQL database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified iDempiere settings for this task: Currency is 'USD', Frequency is 'Quarterly' (internal value 'Q'), Calculation Basis is 'Invoice' (internal value 'I'), and List Details must be enabled ('Y'). Commission rates of 5 and 10 correspond to the multiplier amount fields (amtmultiplier). Note: The existence of 'Joe Block' and 'Patio Furniture' in the sample database is unconfirmed, but the agent should attempt to input them into the respective Business Partner/Rep and Product Category fields.
